report_name: 29 Arrested as 'Operation KRATOS 2' Dismantles Nine Illegal Streaming Networks Across Europe

campaigns.name: Operation KRATOS 2
campaigns.description: A coordinated law enforcement action involving police forces from 13 European countries that targeted and dismantled nine distinct criminal networks responsible for the illegal streaming of copyrighted content, resulting in 29 arrests.
campaigns.objective: Dismantle criminal networks specializing in illegal online streaming.

infrastructure.name: Illegal Streaming Networks Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: The servers, domains, and other technical infrastructure supporting nine distinct criminal networks that provided illegal streaming of copyrighted movies, TV shows, and live sports across Europe. This infrastructure was dismantled during Operation KRATOS 2.

indicators.name: DNS Queries to Known Illegal Streaming Domains
indicators.pattern:
title: DNS Query to Known Illegal Streaming Domain
id: 9c5b1f3a-8d7e-4b6f-9c1d-5a8b3e4f2c1a
status: experimental
description: >
  Detects DNS queries for domains associated with illegal streaming and digital piracy, as mentioned in the context of Operation KRATOS 2.
  Accessing such sites can expose corporate networks to malware. This rule is a template and should be populated with domains from a relevant threat intelligence feed.
references:
  - https://www.reddit.com/r/pwnhub/comments/1tyl8kv/this_week_had_a_17mdevice_botnet_takedown_an/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-07
tags:
  - attack.t1071.004
level: medium
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|contains:
      # The following are examples and should be replaced with actual indicators from a TI feed.
      - 'streaming-piracy-example.com'
      - 'illegal-movies-example.net'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: This indicator detects DNS queries to domains associated with illegal streaming services. The article notes that while no specific domains were released, monitoring for such activity is a key detection method for mitigating corporate risk from malware often found on these sites.

relationships.source_name: DNS Queries to Known Illegal Streaming Domains
